summary: `/opt/archon` is installed by the `dark-factory/Dockerfile` as root (not factory user) — `factory` cannot write to it; implement Archon fixes by cloning to a writable path (`GH_TOKEN=$(gh auth token) && git clone "https://${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/omniscient/Archon.git" ~/archon-fix`), then push a branch, create an Archon PR, and update the `git checkout` hash in `dark-factory/Dockerfile`.
